pi_items.source: Explicitly required by task.json description and provided by install_autopsy.sh setup scripts
Autopsy case creation behavior combined with setup_autopsy.sh setting CasesRootFolder to /home/ga/Cases

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the DFTT #8 JPEG Search test image, a synthetically generated disk image designed by Brian Carrier to test forensic tools. The agent must create an Autopsy case named "Evidence_Review_2024" with case number "CASE-2024-002". Autopsy defaults case creation to "/home/ga/Cases" per setup configuration, making the expected case directory "/home/ga/Cases/Evidence_Review_2024". The disk image loaded is exactly located at "/home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd".
